channel.title: whimsysoul
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from whimsysoul

item.title: Steal my winter wine country wellness getaway itinerary! (say that 5 times fast lol) ⬇️ I love a good winter getaway in wine country and @Fairmont Sonoma is THE place to make as your home base. I'm literally obsessed with their spa which has multiple out
item.description: Steal my winter wine country wellness getaway itinerary! (say that 5 times fast lol) ⬇️ I love a good winter getaway in wine country and @Fairmont Sonoma is THE place to make as your home base. I'm literally obsessed with their spa which has multiple out

item.title: Would you trust her to park your car? 🐈‍⬛ #cat #sonoma @Fairmont Sonoma
item.description: Would you trust her to park your car? 🐈‍⬛ #cat #sonoma @Fairmont Sonoma

item.title: Mrs. Doubtfire's house is REAL and in San Francisco! ⬇️ Welcome to SF on Screen, my new mini-series. San Francisco has starred in more iconic movies and shows than you think, and I’m taking you to my favorite filming spots. ✨First up: the Mrs. Doubtfire h
item.description: Mrs. Doubtfire's house is REAL and in San Francisco! ⬇️ Welcome to SF on Screen, my new mini-series. San Francisco has starred in more iconic movies and shows than you think, and I’m taking you to my favorite filming spots. ✨First up: the Mrs. Doubtfire h

item.title: Bring your shoes in! This local SF business deserves all the love! #sanfrancisco #shoerepair #localbusinesses #bayarea
item.description: Bring your shoes in! This local SF business deserves all the love! #sanfrancisco #shoerepair #localbusinesses #bayarea

item.title: hidden in San Francisco overlooking all of the Castro and Twin Peaks is this crazy cool Airbnb apartment 😱 My mom (Mama Whimsy!) is in town visiting and I knew I had to put her up in a cool place filled with color, texture, art and good views of the city.
item.description: hidden in San Francisco overlooking all of the Castro and Twin Peaks is this crazy cool Airbnb apartment 😱 My mom (Mama Whimsy!) is in town visiting and I knew I had to put her up in a cool place filled with color, texture, art and good views of the city.

item.title: Princess Diaries filming locations in San Francisco! ⬇️ 👑 In the movie, Mia and her mom live in an artisan firehouse in SOMA... in real life, it's located in Excelsior... 6 miles from SOMA. Her school is actually a fancy mansion located in Cow Hollow. An
item.description: Princess Diaries filming locations in San Francisco! ⬇️ 👑 In the movie, Mia and her mom live in an artisan firehouse in SOMA... in real life, it's located in Excelsior... 6 miles from SOMA. Her school is actually a fancy mansion located in Cow Hollow. An

item.title: everywhere I took my Mom in San Francisco since she had a hard year and deserved PRINCESS TREATMENT! 🐟 Dinner at Waterbar & lunch at Fish were her top hit meals 🛍️ Shopping at @Rothy’s , @Sézane and @LE LABO Fragrances ❤️ put her up in the coolest @airbn
item.description: everywhere I took my Mom in San Francisco since she had a hard year and deserved PRINCESS TREATMENT! 🐟 Dinner at Waterbar & lunch at Fish were her top hit meals 🛍️ Shopping at @Rothy’s , @Sézane and @LE LABO Fragrances ❤️ put her up in the coolest @airbn

item.title: California's bext Mexican is hidden away in the tiny mountain town of Murphys 🤯🌮 Every time we're at our cabin up in Arnold, we always stop by Taqueria La Cabaña for lunch at least once... and often multiple times during our getaway since it's that good!
item.description: California's bext Mexican is hidden away in the tiny mountain town of Murphys 🤯🌮 Every time we're at our cabin up in Arnold, we always stop by Taqueria La Cabaña for lunch at least once... and often multiple times during our getaway since it's that good!

item.title: top SF Super Bowl LX event starts on Tuesday!! 🏈⬇️ 🏈 I had a chance to check out the official @NFL Super Bowl fan experience today as part of the media and guys it's INSANE. I clocked about 2 miles walking all around the Moscone Center checking out all th
item.description: top SF Super Bowl LX event starts on Tuesday!! 🏈⬇️ 🏈 I had a chance to check out the official @NFL Super Bowl fan experience today as part of the media and guys it's INSANE. I clocked about 2 miles walking all around the Moscone Center checking out all th

item.title: NFL asked me to attend their media preview event and of course I said yes!! 🏈 I thought it would be fun to show you what happens BTS of media events like this. Some media things are casual but the NFL is pretty buttoned up. We had to submit info and pho
item.description: NFL asked me to attend their media preview event and of course I said yes!! 🏈 I thought it would be fun to show you what happens BTS of media events like this. Some media things are casual but the NFL is pretty buttoned up. We had to submit info and pho

item.title: San Francisco crabbing lesson! ⬇️ 🦀 we caught so many crabs! Welcome back to my Finding Whimsy series. I've been wanting to learn how to crab in the San Francisco Bay for literal years and decided to actually just do the dang thing (yolo!) I found this f
item.description: San Francisco crabbing lesson! ⬇️ 🦀 we caught so many crabs! Welcome back to my Finding Whimsy series. I've been wanting to learn how to crab in the San Francisco Bay for literal years and decided to actually just do the dang thing (yolo!) I found this f

item.title: "Wait San Francisco isn't Gotham? Fox News lied to us??" Happy everyone else is finally getting it 😂 welcome to the best city on the planet thanks for coming out this week #sanfrancisco #superbowl #california
item.description: "Wait San Francisco isn't Gotham? Fox News lied to us??" Happy everyone else is finally getting it 😂 welcome to the best city on the planet thanks for coming out this week #sanfrancisco #superbowl #california

item.title: Met 49er royalty, picked up so much swag, was 10000% more colorful than every New Yorker in town and had a blast at the NPR Tiny Desk concert, which was not, in fact tiny at all. It was a PARTY. 🎊 San Francisco is bumping this week with events and celebri
item.description: Met 49er royalty, picked up so much swag, was 10000% more colorful than every New Yorker in town and had a blast at the NPR Tiny Desk concert, which was not, in fact tiny at all. It was a PARTY. 🎊 San Francisco is bumping this week with events and celebri

item.title: Gonna do a giveaway with some of my Super Bowl event swag so stay tuned!! Thank you to these amazing brands for gifting these goodies @Stoney Clover Lane @Wife’d Up Mic’d Up @COVERGIRL #sanfrancisco #stoneyclover #superbowl #SuperBowlLX #nfl
item.description: Gonna do a giveaway with some of my Super Bowl event swag so stay tuned!! Thank you to these amazing brands for gifting these goodies @Stoney Clover Lane @Wife’d Up Mic’d Up @COVERGIRL #sanfrancisco #stoneyclover #superbowl #SuperBowlLX #nfl

item.title: We were hoping for a surprise performance but she came in and right back out with her security after filming some things for the TikTok Clubhouse 😂 love you Cardi B, one day I'll see you perform live. #tiktokclubhouse @TikTok #sanfrancisco #cardib #super
item.description: We were hoping for a surprise performance but she came in and right back out with her security after filming some things for the TikTok Clubhouse 😂 love you Cardi B, one day I'll see you perform live. #tiktokclubhouse @TikTok #sanfrancisco #cardib #super

item.title: TikTok Clubhouse in San Francisco for Super Bowl weekend ✨🏈 If you've ever wondered what happens... here's a peek 👀 @TikTok @tiktok creators @Doritos @xfinity @Ulta Beauty #tiktok #sanfrancisco #superbowl #cardib #kekepalmer
item.description: TikTok Clubhouse in San Francisco for Super Bowl weekend ✨🏈 If you've ever wondered what happens... here's a peek 👀 @TikTok @tiktok creators @Doritos @xfinity @Ulta Beauty #tiktok #sanfrancisco #superbowl #cardib #kekepalmer

item.title: #xfinitypartner San Francisco x Jurassic Park!! 😱🦖 Wifi … finds a way, so @xfinity brought a Jurassic Park experience to our streets for the Big Game and you got to hold onto your butts 😉 with all the cool things happening. 🦕Interactive T-Rex on Market S
item.description: #xfinitypartner San Francisco x Jurassic Park!! 😱🦖 Wifi … finds a way, so @xfinity brought a Jurassic Park experience to our streets for the Big Game and you got to hold onto your butts 😉 with all the cool things happening. 🦕Interactive T-Rex on Market S

item.title: GIVEAWAY! 🏈Snag Super Bowl event swag from exclusive collabs to makeup and keychains. Thank you so much for supporting me this week and watching along all my Super Bowl coverage. I have the best community and wanted to give back! ✨❤️ HOW TO ENTER: 1️⃣ Fo
item.description: GIVEAWAY! 🏈Snag Super Bowl event swag from exclusive collabs to makeup and keychains. Thank you so much for supporting me this week and watching along all my Super Bowl coverage. I have the best community and wanted to give back! ✨❤️ HOW TO ENTER: 1️⃣ Fo

item.title: that massage was insane! 😱 My practitioner at Vinarosa Resort and Spa is learning TCM (traditional Chinese medicine) and did magic things to my back. 100% would come back here for another girls spa day in wine country! 👙swimsuit from @cupshe_official #s
item.description: that massage was insane! 😱 My practitioner at Vinarosa Resort and Spa is learning TCM (traditional Chinese medicine) and did magic things to my back. 100% would come back here for another girls spa day in wine country! 👙swimsuit from @cupshe_official #s

item.title: game changer for travelers! Stop packing full sized products and instead try these sleek and cute pods for serums, sunscreen, shampoo, etc I've been using Cadence pods for years and just got a new color (pink!) for this years trips. I love to maintain my
item.description: game changer for travelers! Stop packing full sized products and instead try these sleek and cute pods for serums, sunscreen, shampoo, etc I've been using Cadence pods for years and just got a new color (pink!) for this years trips. I love to maintain my

item.title: If I was a rich powerful woman catch me painting my San Francisco house colorful and hiring local artists to have a residency on my garage door. Zero sketchy islands just art #sanfrancisco
item.description: If I was a rich powerful woman catch me painting my San Francisco house colorful and hiring local artists to have a residency on my garage door. Zero sketchy islands just art #sanfrancisco

item.title: why I bought my Camino shell & passport online early ⬇️ Guys I'm walking the Camino de Santiago this spring!!! I've been wanting to do this for years and I'm beyond thrilled. I don't have a LOT of wiggle room on timing. I'm walking in between a trip to C
item.description: why I bought my Camino shell & passport online early ⬇️ Guys I'm walking the Camino de Santiago this spring!!! I've been wanting to do this for years and I'm beyond thrilled. I don't have a LOT of wiggle room on timing. I'm walking in between a trip to C

item.title: SF's Lunar New Year events have arrived! 🔥🐴 The Year Of The Fire Horse is almost here and San Francisco's Chinatown is already popping off! For this episode of Finding Whimsy, Robin and I popped down to the Flower Market to grab some goodies to kick off c
item.description: SF's Lunar New Year events have arrived! 🔥🐴 The Year Of The Fire Horse is almost here and San Francisco's Chinatown is already popping off! For this episode of Finding Whimsy, Robin and I popped down to the Flower Market to grab some goodies to kick off c

item.title: wish me luck 😭 I live in a tiny San Francisco apartment and need to do a massive deep clean and organize at least once a year and this past year has been crazy. Ive been developing my personal style more which means more clothes and somehow I have to dea
item.description: wish me luck 😭 I live in a tiny San Francisco apartment and need to do a massive deep clean and organize at least once a year and this past year has been crazy. Ive been developing my personal style more which means more clothes and somehow I have to dea

item.title: brb off to the Turret for murrdderr #thetraitors It's been pouring rain here in San Francisco this week! I got this rain jacket in Copenhagen at Fotex and it the best dang rain jacket ever so pick one up if you're ever in Denmark lol. They got some famou
item.description: brb off to the Turret for murrdderr #thetraitors It's been pouring rain here in San Francisco this week! I got this rain jacket in Copenhagen at Fotex and it the best dang rain jacket ever so pick one up if you're ever in Denmark lol. They got some famou

item.title: SF rain can't stop my vibe 🌧️ the weather has been crazy today but thankfully I invested in the cutest @bogsfootwear wellies a few years ago and a workhorse rain jacket from Denmark. #sanfrancisco #rainyday #midsizestyle #rain #ootd
item.description: SF rain can't stop my vibe 🌧️ the weather has been crazy today but thankfully I invested in the cutest @bogsfootwear wellies a few years ago and a workhorse rain jacket from Denmark. #sanfrancisco #rainyday #midsizestyle #rain #ootd

item.title: Beginner's luck? Can't wait to scream LET THE RAIN FALL DOWN with 20k other people this summer 💃 🪩 🌧️ @hilaryduff #hilaryduff #millennial #shorelineamphiteater #bayarea
item.description: Beginner's luck? Can't wait to scream LET THE RAIN FALL DOWN with 20k other people this summer 💃 🪩 🌧️ @hilaryduff #hilaryduff #millennial #shorelineamphiteater #bayarea

item.title: San Francisco Beer Week is here!!! 🍻 Feb 20th - March 1st, breweries, restaurants and bars all across San Francisco and the Bay Area are doing special promotions, tapping exclusive kegs, offering rate beers on tap, having events and more. It's always a p
item.description: San Francisco Beer Week is here!!! 🍻 Feb 20th - March 1st, breweries, restaurants and bars all across San Francisco and the Bay Area are doing special promotions, tapping exclusive kegs, offering rate beers on tap, having events and more. It's always a p

item.title: San Francisco's women's sport bar is THE place to catch the Winter Olympics games! ❄️ On this episode of ✨Finding Whimsy✨ my friend and I headed to Rikkis Bar in the Castro to watch Women's Curling and Speedskating. 🍟🍷 I love their happy hour deal: $7 be
item.description: San Francisco's women's sport bar is THE place to catch the Winter Olympics games! ❄️ On this episode of ✨Finding Whimsy✨ my friend and I headed to Rikkis Bar in the Castro to watch Women's Curling and Speedskating. 🍟🍷 I love their happy hour deal: $7 be

item.title: Full House filming locations in San Francisco! ⬇️ ❤️ In iconic tv series Full House, the Tanner family lives in a classic San Francisco house on 1709 Broderick Street... that is now worth over $6 million 😬 Many tourist come to Alamo Square (one of my fav
item.description: Full House filming locations in San Francisco! ⬇️ ❤️ In iconic tv series Full House, the Tanner family lives in a classic San Francisco house on 1709 Broderick Street... that is now worth over $6 million 😬 Many tourist come to Alamo Square (one of my fav
